parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ url: $json.grantUrl, formats: ['markdown'], onlyMainContent: true, waitFor: 2000 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022', max_tokens: 1000, temperature: 0.1, system: 'You are a senior grant consultant with 20 years experience assessing grant eligibility and writing winning proposals. Return only valid JSON.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Assess eligibility for this grant application.

ORGANISATION PROFILE:
Name: ' + $json.orgName + '
Type: ' + $json.orgType + '
Mission: ' + $json.mission + '
Project: ' + $json.projectTitle + '
Summary: ' + $json.projectSummary + '
Amount Requested: $' + $json.amountRequested + '
Total Project Cost: $' + $json.totalProjectCost + '
Beneficiaries: ' + $json.targetBeneficiaries + '

GRANT FUNDER PAGE CONTENT:
' + $json.grantPageContent + '

Return ONLY this JSON:
{
  "isEligible": true_or_false,
  "eligibilityScore": 1_to_100,
  "eligibilityReason": "2-3 sentence explanation",
  "keyThemes": ["top 5 themes this grant prioritises based on the funder page"],
  "strengthsForThisGrant": ["org strengths that align with the grant"],
  "weaknesses": ["potential issues or gaps in the application"],
  "keywordsToUse": ["specific language/phrases from the funder page to mirror in the proposal"],
  "recommendedBudgetApproach": "advice on how to frame the budget request",
  "winningAngle": "the single most compelling angle for this specific funder"
}' }] }) }}

parameters.subject: ={{ 'Grant Application Assessment — ' + $json.projectTitle }}
parameters.message:
={{ '

Dear ' + $json.contactName + ',

Thank you for submitting your grant application intake for ' + $json.projectTitle + ' through our AI Grant Assessment system.

After reviewing your organisation profile against the eligibility criteria for ' + $json.grantFunder + ', our assessment indicates that this particular application may face eligibility challenges:

' + $json.eligibilityReason + '

Eligibility confidence score: ' + $json.eligibilityScore + '/100

We recommend reviewing the grant criteria at ' + $json.grantUrl + ' and considering alternative funding opportunities. Our team can assist in identifying better-matched grants for your project.

Best regards,
Grant Services Team

' }}

parameters.body:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022', max_tokens: 4000, temperature: 0.5, system: 'You are an award-winning grant writer with expertise across social services, arts, environment, research, and community development. You write compelling, evidence-based proposals that funders fund. Mirror the funder's language. Be specific and quantifiable. Write in the third person. Return only valid JSON.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Write a complete, fundable grant proposal using this information.

ORGANISATION: ' + $json.orgName + ' (' + $json.orgType + ')
MISSION: ' + $json.mission + '
FOUNDED: ' + $json.yearFounded + '
STAFF: ' + $json.numStaff + '
ANNUAL BUDGET: ' + $json.annualBudget + '
PAST GRANTS: ' + $json.pastGrants + '

PROJECT TITLE: ' + $json.projectTitle + '
SUMMARY: ' + $json.projectSummary + '
LOCATION: ' + $json.projectLocation + '
BENEFICIARIES: ' + $json.targetBeneficiaries + '
DURATION: ' + $json.projectDuration + '
AMOUNT REQUESTED: $' + $json.amountRequested + '
TOTAL PROJECT COST: $' + $json.totalProjectCost + '
FUNDING GAP: ' + $json.fundingGap + '
EXPECTED OUTCOMES: ' + $json.outcomesExpected + '
EVALUATION PLAN: ' + $json.evaluationPlan + '
ADDITIONAL CONTEXT: ' + $json.additionalContext + '

GRANT FUNDER: ' + $json.grantFunder + '
KEY THEMES TO ADDRESS: ' + $json.keyThemes.join(', ') + '
WINNING ANGLE: ' + $json.winningAngle + '
KEYWORDS TO MIRROR: ' + $json.keywordsToUse.join(', ') + '

Return ONLY this JSON:
{
  "executiveSummary": "200-word compelling overview that hooks the funder immediately",
  "problemStatement": "300-word evidence-based articulation of the need/problem being addressed",
  "projectDescription": "400-word detailed description of what will be done, how",
  "methodology": "300-word description of approach, activities, timeline milestones",
  "expectedOutcomes": "250-word SMART outcomes with specific numbers and timeframes",
  "evaluationPlan": "200-word plan for measuring success and reporting back to funder",
  "organisationalCapacity": "200-word demonstration of why this org is qualified to deliver",
  "budgetNarrative": "200-word justification of the requested amount and budget breakdown",
  "sustainability": "150-word plan for how project continues after grant period",
  "coverLetter": "300-word professional cover letter to the funder",
  "titleOptions": ["3 alternative project title options that are engaging and keyword-rich"]
}' }] }) }}

parameters.title: ={{ $json.applicationId + ' — ' + $json.orgName + ' — ' + $json.projectTitle + ' — DRAFT' }}
parameters.content:
={{ '# GRANT PROPOSAL — DRAFT

**Application ID:** ' + $json.applicationId + '
**Organisation:** ' + $json.orgName + '
**Project:** ' + $json.projectTitle + '
**Funder:** ' + $json.grantFunder + '
**Amount Requested:** $' + $json.amountRequested + '
**Submission Deadline:** ' + $json.grantDeadline + '
**Eligibility Score:** ' + $json.eligibilityScore + '/100

---

## COVER LETTER

' + $json.proposal_coverLetter + '

---

## EXECUTIVE SUMMARY

' + $json.proposal_executiveSummary + '

---

## PROBLEM STATEMENT

' + $json.proposal_problemStatement + '

---

## PROJECT DESCRIPTION

' + $json.proposal_projectDescription + '

---

## METHODOLOGY & TIMELINE

' + $json.proposal_methodology + '

---

## EXPECTED OUTCOMES

' + $json.proposal_expectedOutcomes + '

---

## EVALUATION PLAN

' + $json.proposal_evaluationPlan + '

---

## ORGANISATIONAL CAPACITY

' + $json.proposal_organisationalCapacity + '

---

## BUDGET NARRATIVE

' + $json.proposal_budgetNarrative + '

---

## SUSTAINABILITY

' + $json.proposal_sustainability + '

---

## CONSULTANT NOTES

**Winning Angle:** ' + $json.winningAngle + '
**Keywords to Mirror:** ' + $json.keywordsToUse.join(', ') + '
**Weaknesses to Address:** ' + $json.weaknesses.join('; ') + '
**Alternative Title Options:** ' + ($json.titleOptions || []).join(' | ') + '

*Generated by AI Grant Writer — requires human review before submission*' }}

parameters.subject: ={{ 'Your Grant Proposal Draft is Ready — ' + $json.projectTitle + ' [' + $json.applicationId + ']' }}
parameters.message:
={{ '

Dear ' + $json.contactName + ',

Great news! Your AI-drafted grant proposal for ' + $json.projectTitle + ' (applying to ' + $json.grantFunder + ') is ready for your review.

Eligibility Assessment: ' + $json.eligibilityScore + '/100 — ' + $json.eligibilityReason + '

What has been drafted:

  • Cover Letter
  • Executive Summary
  • Problem Statement
  • Project Description
  • Methodology & Timeline
  • Expected Outcomes
  • Evaluation Plan
  • Organisational Capacity
  • Budget Narrative
  • Sustainability Plan

Next Steps:
1. Review all sections carefully — the AI draft is a starting point
2. Add specific data, statistics, and quotes where indicated
3. Adjust the budget narrative to match your actual figures
4. Our consultant will contact you within 2 business days for a review call
5. Submission deadline: ' + $json.grantDeadline + '

Application ID: ' + $json.applicationId + '

Best regards,
Grant Services Team

' }}
